title: Morning writing practice
subtitle: Practice: begin without reorganizing notes
practice_target: Begin writing at 09:00 without reorganizing notes

practice_protocol.title: Lock the phone and router away
practice_protocol.subtext: Before sitting down, not after the urge appears.

practice_protocol.title: Open the document at 09:00
practice_protocol.subtext: The document, not the notes folder.

practice_protocol.title: Write for 20 minutes
practice_protocol.subtext: Keep writing even if the scene gets uncertain.

practice_protocol.title: Mark when the urge to reorganize appears
practice_protocol.subtext: Note the moment. Don't act on it yet.

practice_protocol.title: Continue or stop, and record what happened

intervention: Phone and router locked away before sitting down.
predicted_break: When the scene becomes uncertain, opening old notes will feel necessary.
predicted_excuse: I'll tell myself I just need to check one detail.
evidence_to_notice: When the urge appears, whether the barrier holds, and what happens next.
why: I want proof that I can stay with uncertainty instead of dodging it into busywork — that matters whether or not this scene ends up any good.
feeling: Calm, even without a finished scene. The practice happened honestly.

display_cues.intervention: Phone and router locked away first.
display_cues.predicted_break: Uncertainty will pull you toward old notes.
display_cues.evidence: Did the barrier hold when the urge appeared?

check_in.title: The knock
check_in.question: Is the practice holding?
check_in.no_response: Record what broke. That is evidence for the next attempt.

exit_prompts: Where did the predicted pattern appear?
What helped you stay with the practice?
What did not work, or worked differently than expected?
What should change in the next attempt?
